title: Throwing a small stoneware teapot
notes: Three-part thrown teapot: body (approximately 600 ml volume), lid with flange, and pulled spout. Strainer holes pierced in body before spout attachment. Handle pulled from a drawn coil and attached at leather-hard. Glaze-fired to cone 6. Explains all the caliper-fitting and lid-gallery work. References centring-half-kilo-of-stoneware, throwing-a-lidded-jar-stoneware, and pulling-and-attaching-a-thrown-spout technique tutorials.
